questions.question: Explain the key differences between Traditional Business Intelligence and Big Data in terms of data types and processing capabilities. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Traditional Business Intelligence focuses on structured data, whereas Big Data is based on unstructured data.

questions.question: Compare the scalability of Traditional Business Intelligence systems with Big Data systems. How do the latter handle large volumes of data? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Big Data systems are designed to handle massive volumes of data through distributed processing and storage.

questions.question: Why do organizations still use Traditional Business Intelligence despite the advancements of Big Data? What are the limitations of each approach? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Traditional Business Intelligence excels in data analysis and visualization, while Big Data excels in predictive analytics and real-time insights.
